$comment: Single source of truth for ALL branding. Edit this, run `pnpm brand:apply`, and every consumer (Capacitor configs, electron-builder, Info.plist, entitlements, web manifest, Swift constants, root package.json, README badges) is regenerated. Adding a new consumer? Add a function to scripts/native/apply-brand.mjs.
name: career-ops
tagline: AI-powered, multi-user job search platform — SvelteKit + Capacitor + Better Auth + Drizzle + Anthropic + Gemini.
description: Multi-user job search platform: scoring, CV generation, autonomous apply across 11 ATS portals, native apps on iOS/macOS/Windows/Linux/Android/Watch, passkey-only auth.

permissions.localNetworkUsage: career-ops uses local network discovery to find your desktop app on the same wifi.
permissions.faceIdUsage: career-ops uses Face ID to protect sensitive screens like the negotiation playbook.
